ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.ip: Protected object IP address of the DDoS enhanced protection package
ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.thresholdType: Clean threshold setting type for the protected IP, including bandwidth cap (bandwidth), intelligent threshold (auto), and manual setting (manual)
ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.cleanMbps: Traffic bandwidth in Mbps per second, minimum 120 Mbps, maximum 10000 Mbps (required when threshold type is manual)
ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.cleanPps: Packet count in pps per second, minimum 58594 pps, maximum 4882813 pps (required when threshold type is manual)
